The official Omega Olympic countdown clock in front of the Eiffel Tower displays the 149 remaining days until the opening ceremony of the Paris 2024 Olympic Games, in Paris, France, February 27, 2024. /CFP

Tens of thousands of Olympic athletics tickets will go on sale next Monday for events at the Stade de France on August 2-10, the Paris 2024 organizers said on Tuesday.

"Several tens of thousands of new tickets will go on sale for this 'Athletics Special' sale. This is one of a series of surprise events organized by Paris 2024 over the next few weeks leading up to the Games," Paris 2024 said in a statement.

Paris 2024 said the cheapest tickets, for the morning sessions, would cost 24 euros ($25.92), while the evening session offers start at 85 euros ($91.82).

More than 8 million of the 10 million tickets for the July 26-August 11 Olympics have already been sold.
